title: lithospermum oaxacanum
intro: Lithospermum oaxacanum, also known as Rock Blue Cough, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties that help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lithospermum oaxacanum include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and clearing mucus from the lungs. Lithospermum oaxacanum can be prepared as an herbal tea by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant's extract with a solvent.
